# IssuerValidationDecision enumeration

The decision the §23.7 issuer-validation table yields for the `iss` parameter (spec §23.7, R-23.7-d).

```csharp
public enum IssuerValidationDecision
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Compare | `0` | `iss` is present; compare it to the recorded issuer. |
| Reject | `1` | `iss` is absent though advertised as supported; reject. |
| Proceed | `2` | `iss` is absent and not advertised; proceed without comparison. |
